title: Kernel workflow script gap closure
question: Do the documented kernel review workflow commands exist and fail closed?
verification: bash -n passed for all three scripts.
kernel-validation-floor --repo /Users/enzo/projects/linux-a733 passed the basic diff/pinmux floor.
kernel-validation-floor with the current patch snapshot failed closed at the known H119 patch 0002 apply issue.
decision: Workflow automation now has concrete local entry points. The patch snapshot remains not send-ready until regenerated from a clean base.
next_action: Use scripts/kernel-review-branch to create the next clean review marker, then regenerate/fold the series and rerun scripts/kernel-validation-floor.
